title: 10 best herbal decoctions for over bleeding during periods
intro_desc: Herbal decoctions for over bleeding during periods are natural remedies made from infusing herbs in hot water to create a concentrated liquid extract. These decoctions help alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding by toning the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and promoting clotting. Examples of herbal decoctions that show promise include those made with ginger, turmeric, and red clover. By using these decoctions, women can reduce their reliance on pharmaceutical treatments and experience fewer symptoms of heavy periods, such as anxiety, fatigue, and digestive issues, allowing them to lead more comfortable and normal lives.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because of its antifibrinolytic properties, which help to stabilize blood clots and prevent excessive bleeding. The decoction's astringent compounds also constrict the blood vessels, reducing blood flow and further alleviating heavy menstrual bleeding. Additionally, the decoction may help to tone the uterine lining, reducing the likelihood of endometrial tissue breakage and subsequent bleeding. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to provide relief from excessive menstrual bleeding, offering a safe and effective alternative to synthetic medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties: Ginkgo biloba's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the uterus, which could alleviate menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding.
Vasodilatory effects: Ginkgo biloba's ability to dilate blood vessels may help improve blood flow and reduce blood clotting, potentially decreasing menstrual bleeding and discomfort.
Hormone regulation: Ginkgo biloba has been suggested to have estrogenic and progestogenic effects, which could help regulate hormonal imbalances that contribute to heavy or irregular periods.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help to reduce blood clotting time and alleviate heavy menstrual bleeding.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes contain bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various gynecological issues, including excessive menstrual bleeding, by regulating hormonal imbalances and improving uterine function.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried ginkgo biloba leaves in sufficient quantity for the desired dose.
Measure out one teaspoon of dried ginkgo biloba leaves per cup of water and add it to a tea infuser or heat-resistant cup.
Pour boiling water over the ginkgo biloba leaves, allowing them to steep for 10-15 minutes to release their active compounds.
Strain the decoction through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into another cup, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid extract.
Allow the decoction to cool down to room temperature before refrigerating it in an airtight container for up to 3 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guelder rose decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because it possesses antihemorrhagic properties that effectively regulate menstrual flow. The herb's flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have been shown to reduce capillary permeability and blood vessel fragility, thereby minimizing excessive bleeding. Additionally, guelder rose decoctions may also help to tone the uterine muscles, reducing contractions and thus alleviating heavy menstrual flow.
remedy_properties: Vasoprotective properties: The decoction's vasoprotective compounds help strengthen blood vessel walls, reducing inflammation and constriction that can contribute to heavy bleeding.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in the decoction help neutralize free radicals that can damage the uterine lining and lead to excessive bleeding during menstruation.

Stabilizing effects on uterine contractions: The herbal components of Guelder Rose have been shown to stabilize uterine contractions, reducing the intensity and frequency of menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in tannins, roots help to constrict blood vessels and reduce excessive menstrual flow.
Bark: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, bark has astringent properties that can stop heavy bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried viburnum opulus leaves and flowers in quantities of 2 tablespoons.
Clean and chop the harvested material into small pieces before storing them in an airtight container.
Combine one teaspoon of chopped viburnum opulus material with 250ml of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass cup.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes to allow the herbal properties to infuse into the hot water.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container and discard the solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because it has a regulating effect on the uterus and pelvic blood vessels. The herbs in dong quai, such as Angelica sinensis, contain compounds that help to strengthen the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and promoting healthy blood flow. By doing so, dong quai decoctions can alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding and restore hormonal balance, providing relief from heavy and prolonged periods. This natural remedy has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various gynecological issues, including menstrual irregularities.
remedy_properties: Antihemorrhagic property: Dong Quai's decoction helps stop bleeding by stimulating platelet aggregation and blood clotting, which reduces blood loss.
Astringent property: The astringent compounds in Dong Quai's decoction help constrict blood vessels, reducing blood flow to the uterus and alleviating heavy menstrual bleeding.

Stabilizing effect on uterine muscles: Dong Quai's decoction is believed to relax and stabilize uterine muscle contractions, which can help reduce bleeding by decreasing uterine tone and reducing the frequency of menstrual cramps.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in bioactive compounds that help to stop excessive bleeding by promoting blood clotting and reducing inflammation.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce menstrual bleeding and alleviate symptoms associated with over bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Rinse 6-8 grams of dried angelica sinensis root in cold water then chop it into small pieces.
Combine the chopped angelica sinensis root with 4 cups of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass or ceramic pot.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the mixture for 30 minutes to release the active compounds.
Strain the decoction through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean container discarding the solids.
Store the cooled decoction in an airtight glass bottle in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural ability to tone and strengthen the uterus. The decoction's bitter compounds, such as taraxasterol and triterpenoids, help to reduce inflammation and relax uterine muscles, which can become spasmodic or contract excessively during heavy menstrual flow. By doing so, dandelion decoctions promote a more normal and regulated bleeding pattern, reducing excessive bleeding and alleviating symptoms of menorrhagia.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Dandelion contains anti-inflammatory compounds like taraxasterol, which can help reduce inflammation in the uterine lining and alleviate menstrual cramps associated with heavy bleeding.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in dandelion decoction, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, can help neutralize free radicals that may contribute to excessive blood loss during menstruation, reducing the severity of bleeding.

Vasoprotective compounds: Dandelion contains vasoprotective compounds like triterpenoid saponins, which can help strengthen blood vessel walls and improve circulation, reducing the likelihood of bleeding and promoting healthy menstrual flow.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in tannins and other compounds that help to constrict blood vessels and reduce excessive bleeding.
Buds: Contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that can help to strengthen capillary walls and alleviate menstrual cramps.
remedy_recipe: Measure one teaspoon of dried taraxacum officinale root per cup of water.
Heat one cup of water in a saucepan over medium heat for seven to ten minutes.
Remove from heat and add measured taraxacum officinale root stirring to combine thoroughly.
Let the mixture steep for twenty to thirty minutes or until it reaches desired strength.
Strain the decoction through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean glass container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Agrimony decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because of its ability to tone and strengthen the uterine muscles, reducing excessive blood flow. The antispasmodic properties in agrimony also help to ease cramps and spasms, further alleviating menstrual discomfort. Additionally, the herb's astringent properties help to constrict blood vessels, thereby decreasing blood loss. By regulating the menstrual cycle, agrimony decoctions can bring relief from heavy or prolonged bleeding, promoting a healthier and more balanced period experience.
remedy_properties: Astringent properties: Agrimony decoctions have astringent properties that help to reduce bleeding by constricting blood vessels and stopping excessive flow.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Agrimony's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the uterus, which can contribute to heavy menstrual bleeding, and also alleviate cramps and pain associated with dysmenorrhea.

Antioxidant properties: Agrimony decoctions rich in antioxidants that help protect the endometrium from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the risk of excessive bleeding and promoting a healthy uterine environment.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in astringent properties, which help to constrict blood vessels and reduce excessive bleeding.
Barks: The barks contain tannins, which aid in stopping bleeding by contracting the blood vessels and promoting clotting.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality agrimonia eupatoria leaves and flowers in the morning or early evening for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested plant material in a well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator on low heat setting until crumbly and brittle.
Combine 10 grams of dried agrimonia eupatoria with 500 milliliters of water in a large pot or teapot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to a simmer for 20-30 minutes, allowing the mixture to steep and release its medicinal properties.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container, discarding solids and reserving the liquid for consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon verbena decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural ability to tone and strengthen the uterine walls, reducing heavy flow and alleviating discomfort. The herb's astringent properties help constrict blood vessels, minimizing excessive bleeding and promoting a more balanced menstrual cycle. Additionally, lemon verbena's calming effects on the nervous system can also ease cramps and emotional distress often associated with heavy bleeding, providing relief and comfort to women during their periods.
remedy_properties: Astringent properties: Lemon verbena decoctions have astringent compounds that help to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding, providing relief from heavy menstrual flow.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidant-rich properties of lemon verbena decoctions help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to excessive bleeding during menstruation.
Uterine-tonic action: Lemon verbena has been shown to have a uterine-tonic effect, which helps to strengthen the uterus and regulate menstrual flow, reducing the risk of heavy or prolonged bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, lemon verbena roots help reduce excessive blood flow and alleviate discomfort associated with heavy menstrual bleeding.
Barks: Containing astringent properties, the barks of lemon verbena plant constrict blood vessels, reducing the amount of blood lost during menstruation.
remedy_recipe: Gather one cup of fresh verbena officinalis leaves and stems, or two tablespoons dried material.
Combine the verbena material with four cups of boiling water in a large glass container.
Steep the mixture for 15-20 minutes to allow the active compounds to infuse into the liquid.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into another clean container.
Store the strained decoction in an amber glass bottle at room temperature, use within six hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Monk's pepper decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because its natural anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce uterine contractions, thereby decreasing blood flow and alleviating excessive menstrual discharge. Additionally, the decoction's antispasmodic effects can relax the uterine muscles, further minimizing bleeding. The combination of these actions helps to normalize menstrual flow, providing relief from discomforting heavy periods.
remedy_properties: Astringent properties: The astringent compounds present in Monk's Pepper help to constrict and tighten blood vessels, reducing blood flow and heavy menstrual bleeding.

Antioxidant activity: Monk's Pepper decoction has antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals, reduce inflammation, and protect the uterine lining from damage, which can contribute to excessive bleeding during menstruation.
Anti-inflammatory action: The anti-inflammatory compounds in Monk's Pepper decoction help to reduce swelling and inflammation in the uterus, which can exacerbate heavy menstrual bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used to create a tonic that helps to regulate menstrual flow and stop excessive bleeding.
Rhizomes: Rhizomes are used to make a decoction that can help to reduce inflammation and ease cramping associated with heavy bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Gather one teaspoon of dried cnidium monnieri herb and one cup of boiling water.
Steep the herb in the boiling water for 15-20 minutes to allow for maximum extraction.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean glass container.
Add one tablespoon of honey to sweeten the decoction if desired and stir well to combine.
Store the cooled decoction in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours and consume as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because of its natural antispasmodic and astringent properties. The decoction's active compounds, such as volatile oils and flavonoids, help to constrict the uterine lining and reduce blood flow, thus alleviating excessive menstrual bleeding. Additionally, fennel's anti-inflammatory effects may also contribute to its ability to calm cramping and discomfort associated with heavy periods, providing relief and promoting a sense of well-being during this time.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic property: Fennel's antispasmodic property helps to relax the uterine muscles and reduce contractions, which can alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding.
Astringent property: Fennel's astringent property helps to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding by causing the blood cells to adhere together, thereby reducing the flow of blood.
Emmenagogue property: Fennel's emmenagogue property helps to regulate menstruation and stimulate blood clotting, which can help to stop or reduce heavy menstrual bleeding.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in estrogenic compounds, which help regulate menstrual flow and ease heavy bleeding.
Seeds: Contain a compound called estragole, which has antispasmodic properties that can help reduce menstrual cramps and bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Gather required materials including dried foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems measuring 2-3 tablespoons.
Boil one quart of water in a pot for 5 minutes at a moderate heat level.
Add the measured foeniculum vulgare to the boiling water and steep for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a separate container.
Store the cooled decoction in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Horehound decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because it has astringent properties that help to constrict blood vessels, reducing excessive menstrual flow. The bitter compounds found in horehound also have an anti-inflammatory effect, which can soothe the uterine lining and reduce cramping associated with heavy bleeding. Additionally, horehound's expectorant properties may help to clear out mucus and debris that can contribute to prolonged bleeding. By addressing these underlying factors, horehound decoctions can provide natural relief from excessive menstrual bleeding.
remedy_properties: Astringent: Horehound decoctions have astringent properties, which help to constrict or shrink blood vessels, thereby reducing excessive bleeding during menstruation.
Tonic: Horehound has tonic properties that help to stimulate and regulate the uterine muscles, promoting normal menstrual flow and reducing heavy or prolonged bleeding.
Antispasmodic: The antispasmodic properties of horehound decoctions can help to alleviate cramps and spasms associated with heavy bleeding during menstruation, providing relief from discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, horehound roots help to stop excessive bleeding by reducing inflammation and promoting clotting.
Bark: Containing tannins and other astringent compounds, the bark of the Horehound plant helps to constrict blood vessels and reduce heavy menstrual bleeding.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried marrubium vulgare leaves and stems in amounts of 2-3 teaspoons per cup of water.
Combine the herbal material with boiling water in a saucepan and reduce heat to simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container and discard solids.
Allow the decoction to cool slightly before drinking it within 30 minutes of preparation, ideally in doses of 1 cup three times daily.
Store any remaining decoction in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours and reheat as needed before consuming.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wintergreen decoctions helps with over bleeding during periods because it contains high levels of salicin, a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory compound. When taken as an herbal remedy, wintergreen decoctions can help to reduce menstrual cramps and ease uterine contractions, which can contribute to excessive bleeding. Additionally, the antioxidant properties of wintergreen may also help to protect the uterine lining from oxidative stress, further reducing the likelihood of heavy bleeding during menstruation.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Wintergreen's antioxidant compounds help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to heavy menstrual bleeding (HMB).

Vasoconstrictive properties: The volatile oils present in wintergreen decoctions have been shown to constrict blood vessels, thereby reducing blood flow to the uterine lining and minimizing excessive bleeding.
Astringent properties: Wintergreen's astringent compounds help to dry up and contract the uterine mucous membranes, further reducing menstrual bleeding and alleviating symptoms of HMB.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in salicin, a natural pain reliever and anti-inflammatory compound that helps to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding.
Barks: Contains tannins, which can help to contract blood vessels and reduce bleeding by reducing the amount of fluid lost through capillary walls.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh gaultheria procumbens leaves in the morning when dewy.
Rinse the harvested leaves thoroughly with pure water and pat dry.
Combine one teaspoon of dried gaultheria procumbens leaves or four teaspoons of fresh leaves with two cups of boiling water.
Steep the mixture for 10 to 15 minutes allowing the decoction to cool slightly.
Strain the decoction and discard the solids before drinking up to three times a day.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat over bleeding during periods with herbal decoctions is to drink a warm infusion of calendula flowers, which have natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Another effective option is to consume a blend of dried herbs including chamomile, sage, and yarrow, as these ingredients can help reduce menstrual flow and alleviate discomfort.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to over bleeding during periods that are treated with herbal decoctions are conditions such as excessive menstrual flow, heavy bleeding after childbirth, or bleeding due to hormonal imbalance. Herbs like Turmeric, Ashwagandha, and White Peony are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to reduce bleeding and promote hemostasis. These herbal decoctions can help alleviate symptoms of heavy bleeding, cramping, and discomfort associated with these conditions.
